title: Added a defer to an Unlock that immediately followed a Lock

comments.body:
I don't have any memory of timing issues here, so I'm inclined to believe
it's just me making silly mistakes. LGTM. Someone not on a cell phone can
trigger the merge :-)

On Tue, Jun 5, 2018, 15:08 Tom Sweeney <notifications@github.com> wrote:

> *@TomSweeneyRedHat* commented on this pull request.
>
> This change LGTM, but I've a vague memory of @mheon
> <https://github.com/mheon> removing the defer here due to some unexpected
> timing issue. I'd like his look see first.
>
> If by chance the code should stay as is, then we need to add a comment
> talking about why the defer is not here.
>
> —
> You are receiving this because you were mentioned.
> Reply to this email directly, view it on GitHub
> <https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/909#pullrequestreview-126153730>,
> or mute the thread
> <https://github.com/notifications/unsubscribe-auth/AHYHCNhyDg0zQNU8fU4Tb9WjCHzhUwhjks5t5vNCgaJpZM4UbefY>
> .
>
LGTM. Merging since @mheon gave the go ahead.
:champagne: toast to @haircommander for the eagle eye.
@umohnani8 Should not manually merge, use rh-atomic-bot in the future.
@rhatdan yeah I figured I made a mistake when I did that. Sorry, will use that in future.
